name: Long Live Caesar
short_description: 44 BC. Caesar, the dictator of Rome, discovers that the threat of conspiracy comes from the people closest to him. Can you resist the impending danger and rewrite history?
detailed_description:
Long Live Caesar is a real-time and turn-based strategy/RPG/brain-twister in which you play Gaius Julius Caesar, who must uncover all conspirators in the Senate, Magistrate, and Legion. Dark days are coming to the Republic - senators weave intrigues, the army will rebel, and the Roman citizens expect strong-willed decisions from you. Can you resist the impending threat and save Rome?

Famous historical characters of Caesar`s era can help or oppose you in that trouble. Be careful. Can you unite each of them under the SPQR banner?

            

Make your decisions wisely, reveal enemies, and reward friends. Remember, only you can determine Caesar's fate. Rewrite history with Long Live Caesar!

* Detective, Strategy, RPG, and brain-twister in one game. And all of it - in Ancient Rome!

* Exorbitant level of juicy pixel violence

* Roles of the conspirators are randomly distributed at the beginning of each game, which makes each passage unique

* Many historical (and not so much) events will give you the definition of replayability

* Every decision is unconditional and irrevocable. You can't reload to your last step. You should meet them face-to-face

* Black humor and references to some modern pop-culture personalities

* Pixel Graphics and an atmospheric soundtrack that brings you back to the 90s

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Swedish, Ukrainian, Belarusian, Dutch
